title: malva columnae
intro: Malva columnae, also known as Malva sylvestris subsp. columnae, is a plant species within the mallow family Malvaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The leaves and roots of Malva columnae contain mucilages and flavonoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing various health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Malva columnae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
